我的项目My Projects

营收功能Revenue Gameplay

电台直播间养鱼Audio Room Fish Raising

用户送礼后可获得一条随机品种的小鱼，继续送礼可为小鱼喂食并推动其成长，同时参与“鱼王”头衔竞争。Designed a fish-raising revenue gameplay feature for audio livestream rooms. After sending gifts, payers receive a random fish, feed and grow it, and compete for the “Fish King” title.

+7.67%主播收礼人数Paying Users
+5.94%主播收礼流水Gift Revenue

电台直播间养鱼Audio Room Fish Raising

用户送礼后可获得一条随机品种的小鱼，继续送礼可为小鱼喂食并推动其成长，同时参与“鱼王”头衔竞争。Designed a fish-raising revenue gameplay feature for audio livestream rooms. After sending gifts, payers receive a random fish, feed and grow it, and compete for the “Fish King” title.

营收活动Revenue Activity

新年运势签New Year Fortune Sign

用户可通过开盲盒获得礼物，十连开必得高倍价值礼物，并有概率获得签文祝福，收集不同签文可解锁稀有成就。Users could open blind boxes to receive gifts, with guaranteed high-value rewards every ten opens and collectible fortune blessings that unlocked rare milestones.

+31.08%大盘收入Total Revenue
39.47%玩法收入占比Revenue Share
